messages.content: ok so this is the party planning group for marcos surprise bday!! may 16 at our apartment. DO NOT tell marco lol

i love u 😭😭
ok so i started doing meal prep this week
like actually planned all my meals
wait for real
YES and its literally a game changer
i made chicken and rice and veggies for the whole week on sunday
ive been wanting to do that tbh
shift days i just eat whatever in the break room
EXACTLY and then u feel like trash at 3pm
so true
ok so heres what u need
chicken breast sweet potatoes broccoli brown rice
cooked it all in 3 hours sunday morning
3 hours and ur done for the whole week??
YES just grab a container and go
get the ones with dividers so stuff doesnt get soggy
ok im ordering groceries tmrw and trying this
YESSS 🔥
get ground turkey too its good for switching it up
ok will do. containers too right
ya the rubbermaid ones on amazon fresh are like $15
adding to cart rn lol
thats my girl 💪
ok update on the meal prep
YESSS tell me how it went
honestly so good
grabbed my container tuesday before shift and didnt think about food all day
SEE I TOLD U 🔥
the chicken and sweet potato was so good
did u do brown rice too
ya and i put sriracha on eveything lol
hahaha same
only thing was broccoli got kinda soft by thursday
ya u gotta undercook it a little
it steams itself in the container
ooh ok noted
but honestly it saved me so much time on shift days

doing it again tmrw
WELCOME to meal prep life bestie 💪🔥

back and biceps. marco held the ring light again lol

just yourself ❤️ mia is gonna flip

ok!! doors open just come up
